chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1612 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioner, no intimation is received so far. However, learned AAG files statement on behalf of respondent No.3 along with copy of appointment order for the post of PST in the name of the petitioner and submits that grievance of the petitioner has now been redressed. Since no one is in attendance and the appointment order has been issued to the petitioner; therefore, this petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
